newSkills.name: openclaw-security-monitor
newSkills.description: Proactive security monitoring for OpenClaw deployments. Detects ClawHavoc, AMOS stealer, CVE-2026-25253, memory poisoning, and supply chain attacks.
newSkills.notes: 关键安全技能。检测 824+ 恶意技能、60+ CVE、100+ GHSAs。包含 41 点安全扫描、IOC 数据库、自动更新威胁情报。建议安装。

newSkills.name: runwayml/openclaw-skills
newSkills.description: AI agent video calling with real-time avatar powered by Runway. Agent initiates call, avatar speaks first, transcript fed back to agent.
newSkills.notes: 创新技能，使用 Runway API 实现视频通话头像。需要 Runway API key，有一定门槛但创新性强。

newSkills.name: autonomys/auto-memory
newSkills.description: Permanent decentralized storage via Autonomys Auto Drive API. Gives AI agents permanent memory and on-chain identity.
newSkills.notes: 去中心化永久存储技能，可替代本地 Markdown 记忆。需 Auto Drive API key (免费)。

newSkills.name: openclaw-security-news
newSkills.description: Collection of global government warnings, vendor advisories, and news headlines about OpenClaw Security.
newSkills.notes: 安全资讯汇总，持续更新。适合关注 OpenClaw 安全动态的用户。

newSkills.name: VoltAgent/awesome-openclaw-skills
newSkills.description: Curated list of best OpenClaw skills with 49.5k stars. Browseable by category.
newSkills.notes: 技能精选列表，非技能本身而是目录。查找高质量技能的首选资源。
